choices.text: Falcon 9 reuse: 30-50% cost cut, B1062 12+ reflights. $/kg dropped from $50k (Saturn V) to $2,700 (Falcon 9). Starship target $10/kg = 200× reduction. Mass launched globally 6× since 2010.

SLS $4.1B/launch expendable 70-95 tons LEO. Starship target $100M/launch fully reusable 100-150 tons. 40× cost difference if Starship works. Different programs same goal: Moon/Mars. SLS government cost-plus; Starship commercial fixed-price.
